use_cases: Displaying key-value information pairs in settings or configuration pages
Showing product feature descriptions with optional contextual tooltips
Adding documentation to form fields or data entries
Creating metadata display panels with title-content structure
ai_summary: A lightweight description component that renders a title with optional tooltip icon and content text. Built with semantic HTML definition list elements, it provides a clean way to display labeled information with contextual help. Supports optional tooltips for supplementary information without cluttering the main layout.
